title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif of Cursor interviews Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, about scaling infrastructure at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies, and the role of AI in coding and engineering hiring. Topics span infrastructure evolution, database innovation, and identifying top-tier engineers in the AI era.
